name: Fla Wizarmon

signature_move.name: Magic Ignition
signature_move.description: Shoots a blue fireball from its staff.

description: A Demon Man Digimon that Armor Evolved with the " Digimental of Courage ". It is full of confidence and shows its true face, the exact opposite of Wizarmon , who is shy and does not show its uncovered face. It wields two matchstick-like staffs, which further enhance the effectiveness of its fire sorcery ( high-level programming language ). Its Signature Move is " Magic Ignition ". Its Special Move is changing its surroundings into a firestorm ( Fire Cloud ).
